mapper.select:
SELECT tb1.DATE , IFNULL(tb2.NOTFIT, 0) AS 'NOTFIT' , IFNULL(tb2.FIT, 0) AS 'FIT' FROM ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT 1 AS ORD , DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE UNION ALL SELECT c.ORD + 1
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
FROM CTE c WHERE 1=1
AND c.ORD < ${diff} + 1
) SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
FROM CTE ) AS tb1 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T.DATE , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN IS_MATCH = '0' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'NOTFIT' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN IS_MATCH = '1' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'FIT' FROM ( SELECT mr.IS_MATCH
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, count(1) AS CNT FROM MSG_RESULT AS mr WHERE 1=1
AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY DATE, mr.IS_MATCH ORDER BY DATE ASC ) T WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY T.DATE ) AS tb2 ON tb1.DATE = tb2.DATE WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY DATE ASC

SELECT tb1.DATE , IFNULL(tb2.NOTFIT, 0) AS 'NOTFIT' , IFNULL(tb2.FIT, 0) AS 'FIT' FROM ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT 1 AS ORD , DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE UNION ALL SELECT c.ORD + 1
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
FROM CTE c WHERE 1=1
AND c.ORD < ${diff} + 1
) SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
FROM CTE ) AS tb1 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T.DATE , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN IS_MATCH = '0' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'NOTFIT' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN IS_MATCH = '1' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'FIT' FROM ( SELECT mr.IS_MATCH
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, count(1) AS CNT FROM MSG_RESULT AS mr WHERE 1=1
AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY DATE, mr.IS_MATCH ORDER BY DATE ASC ) T WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY T.DATE ) AS tb2 ON tb1.DATE = tb2.DATE WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY DATE ASC

SELECT T.BR_CODE , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN IS_MATCH = '0' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'NOTFIT' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN IS_MATCH = '1' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'FIT' FROM ( SELECT mr.BR_CODE , mr.IS_MATCH , count(1) AS CNT FROM MSG_RESULT AS mr WHERE 1=1
AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY BR_CODE, mr.IS_MATCH ORDER BY BR_CODE ASC ) T WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY T.BR_CODE

SELECT T.BR_CODE , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN IS_MATCH = '0' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'NOTFIT' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN IS_MATCH = '1' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'FIT' FROM ( SELECT mr.BR_CODE , mr.IS_MATCH , count(1) AS CNT FROM MSG_RESULT AS mr WHERE 1=1
AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY BR_CODE, mr.IS_MATCH ORDER BY BR_CODE ASC ) T WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY T.BR_CODE

SELECT tb1.DATE , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT1, 0) AS 'SELECT1' , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT2, 0) AS 'SELECT2' , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT3, 0) AS 'SELECT3' , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT4, 0) AS 'SELECT4' FROM ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT 1 AS ORD , DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE UNION ALL SELECT c.ORD + 1
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
FROM CTE c WHERE 1=1
AND c.ORD < ${diff} + 1
) SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
FROM CTE ) AS tb1 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T.DATE , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%기존계약%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select1' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%고객관리%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select2' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%심의필%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select3' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%미심의%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select4' FROM ( SELECT mr.RESULT_LABEL
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, count(1) AS CNT FROM MSG_RESULT AS mr WHERE 1=1
AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY DATE, mr.RESULT_LABEL ORDER BY DATE ASC ) T WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY T.DATE ) AS tb2 ON tb1.DATE = tb2.DATE WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY DATE ASC

SELECT tb1.DATE , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT1, 0) AS 'SELECT1' , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT2, 0) AS 'SELECT2' , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT3, 0) AS 'SELECT3' , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT4, 0) AS 'SELECT4' FROM ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT 1 AS ORD , DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE UNION ALL SELECT c.ORD + 1
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
FROM CTE c WHERE 1=1
AND c.ORD < ${diff} + 1
) SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
FROM CTE ) AS tb1 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T.DATE , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%기존계약%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select1' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%고객관리%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select2' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%심의필%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select3' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%미심의%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select4' FROM ( SELECT mr.RESULT_LABEL
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, count(1) AS CNT FROM MSG_RESULT AS mr WHERE 1=1
AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY DATE, mr.RESULT_LABEL ORDER BY DATE ASC ) T WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY T.DATE ) AS tb2 ON tb1.DATE = tb2.DATE WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY DATE ASC

SELECT tb1.DATE , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT1, 0) AS 'SELECT1' , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT2, 0) AS 'SELECT2' , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT3, 0) AS 'SELECT3' , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT4, 0) AS 'SELECT4' FROM ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT 1 AS ORD , DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE UNION ALL SELECT c.ORD + 1
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
FROM CTE c WHERE 1=1
AND c.ORD < ${diff} + 1
) SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
FROM CTE ) AS tb1 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T.DATE , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%기존계약%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select1' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%고객관리%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select2' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%심의필%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select3' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%미심의%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select4' FROM ( SELECT mr.RESULT_LABEL
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, count(1) AS CNT FROM MSG_RESULT AS mr WHERE 1=1
AND BR_CODE = #{searchBr}
AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY DATE, mr.RESULT_LABEL ORDER BY DATE ASC ) T WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY T.DATE ) AS tb2 ON tb1.DATE = tb2.DATE WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY DATE ASC

SELECT tb1.DATE , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT1, 0) AS 'SELECT1' , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT2, 0) AS 'SELECT2' , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT3, 0) AS 'SELECT3' , IFNULL(tb2.SELECT4, 0) AS 'SELECT4' FROM ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT 1 AS ORD , DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE UNION ALL SELECT c.ORD + 1
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
, DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE
FROM CTE c WHERE 1=1
AND c.ORD < ${diff} + 1
) SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
FROM CTE ) AS tb1 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T.DATE , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%기존계약%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select1' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%고객관리%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select2' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%심의필%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select3' , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN RESULT_LABEL like '%미심의%' THEN cnt END), 0) AS 'select4' FROM ( SELECT mr.RESULT_LABEL
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, count(1) AS CNT FROM MSG_RESULT AS mr WHERE 1=1
AND BR_CODE = #{searchBr}
AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY DATE, mr.RESULT_LABEL ORDER BY DATE ASC ) T WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY T.DATE ) AS tb2 ON tb1.DATE = tb2.DATE WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY DATE ASC
